summary: Stunning 1993 show with Ornette Coleman guest, highlighted by a blazing Space→Other One and classic China>Rider, captured in an audience recording of decent quality.
review: The concert is remembered as one of the best of ’93, driven by high‑energy first set and an old‑school second set that featured a magical Space > The Other One with Ornette Coleman, plus standout China > Rider and Estimated. Reviewers rave about Jerry Garcia’s inspired riff trades with the sax legend, though no specific technical details about the tape are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are highly positive (4‑5 stars) and emphasize exceptional musical moments; recording quality is not discussed, so rating reflects strong show performance with assumed decent audience source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound clarity or mix; reviewers focus on the live experience, implying an audience tape of acceptable but unverified quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy first set followed by an old‑school second set; the flow is praised for its excitement and seamless transitions, especially the Space > Other One segment with Ornette Coleman.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly lauded for his inspired riff trading with Ornette Coleman and overall stellar playing.
